/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/steamdeckmediaplayer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/src/AppState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/src/FileBrowserModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/src/MpvVideoItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/steamdeckmediaplayer_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_SteamDeckMediaPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/steamdeckmediaplayer_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/steamdeckmediaplayer_qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/steamdeckmediaplayer_qml/BrowserView_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/steamdeckmediaplayer_qml/PlayerView_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/steamdeckmediaplayer_qml/ResumeDialog_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steamdeckmediaplayer.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_steamdeckmediaplayer_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o bin/steamdeckmediaplayer -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtQuick /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtQml.framework/Versions/A/QtQml /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers /opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpv/0.41.0_4/lib/libmpv.dylib
